use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF USING RINFABATE RECOMBINANT (RHIGFBP-3) WITH MECASERMIN RECOMBINANT (RHIGF-1) TO PROMOTE LINEAR GROWTH IN THE TREATMENT OF PRIMARY IGF-1 DEFICIENCY
